module_handover.change_summary: main.py: removed write_date = get_next_business_day(today) + logger.info block; removed get_next_business_day import. ui/app.py: removed write_date + logger.info dead code; removed get_next_business_day import; added import re at top; removed inline import re as _re; changed _re.sub to re.sub.

self_check.python39_syntax: PASS — no match/case, no X|Y union, no walrus abuse; stdlib import re is Python 2+ compatible
self_check.type_hinting: PASS — no new functions; existing type hints unchanged
self_check.error_handling: PASS — dead code removal; no error paths introduced
self_check.path_safety: PASS — no path changes in this MT
self_check.al_edge_cases: PASS — re.sub behavior identical to _re.sub (same module, same function)
self_check.pd_policy: PASS — dead code removal; no policy-relevant changes
self_check.docstring: PASS — no new functions; existing docstrings unchanged
